Dark matter. Gold pressure.
Form against the void.

Danger Case· v2· Gold & Obsidian· Motion Studies· TOXIQMYND 2026· Fragment I–XIV· Danger Case· v2· Gold & Obsidian· Motion Studies· TOXIQMYND 2026· Fragment I–XIV· Danger Case· v2· Gold & Obsidian· Motion Studies· TOXIQMYND 2026· Fragment I–XIV· Danger Case· v2· Gold & Obsidian· Motion Studies· TOXIQMYND 2026· Fragment I–XIV· Danger Case· v2· Gold & Obsidian· Motion Studies· TOXIQMYND 2026· Fragment I–XIV· Danger Case· v2· Gold & Obsidian· Motion Studies· TOXIQMYND 2026· Fragment I–XIV·

Where gold meets obsidian, form becomes dangerous.

The Fragment series lives in the space between mineral and memory. Each piece is a pressure event — gold compressed under the weight of nothing.

V2 Danger Case is the unreleased interface. Black lacquer. Gold wire. Maximum restraint carrying maximum tension.

Selected Works
